title: SuggestionCluster
description: A group of related suggestions from one or more agents, clustered by file and line proximity (±5 lines). Multi-agent agreement surfaces as higher 'agreement' counts.

id.description: Stable 6-char hex ID derived from file + line bucket + category

file.description: The canonical file for this cluster

line.description: Representative line number (median of clustered lines, or null)

category.description: Category from the highest-severity suggestion in the cluster

agents.description: Which agents contributed to this cluster

agreement.description: Number of distinct agents that found this issue

suggestedChange.description: Best suggested change (from the highest-severity suggestion)

summary.description: One-line summary from local LLM (populated by kaicho enrich)
